---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

<One or two sentences.>

## Why you want it

<The workflow it unblocks. The mistake it prevents. The friction it removes.>

## Proposed shape

<Is this a new slash command? A new hook? A new pattern file? A change to an existing one?>

## Alternatives considered

<Other designs you thought about and why this one seems better.>

## Would you contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd open a PR
- [ ] I can test the PR someone else writes
- [ ] I'm just flagging the idea

## Check against Zaude's philosophy

- [ ] Hooks for enforcement, skills for suggestions — is this the right extension point?
- [ ] Does this preserve the "can't accidentally ship garbage" property?
- [ ] Does this avoid adding shortcuts that would encourage vibe coding?
